message:
fix(tools): replace blocking sleep with async sleep in grep polling loop

Replace std::thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(1)) with
sleep(wall_now(), Duration::from_millis(1)).await in the grep tool's
polling loop to prevent blocking the async executor thread. Ensures
cooperative yielding within the tokio runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
